tool_args.label: Community Board 5 (Bronx)
tool_args.raw_text: Community Board 5 Feedback: – Leadership support for a busway along Tremont Av – Specific request for more bus priority in CB 5 to address slow bus speeds and issues with reliability – Congestion and pedestrian/bike safety issues throughout the corridor – Concerns about bus stop removal

payload.description: Bronx Community Board 5

evidence_refs.source_quote: Community Board 5 Feedback:
– Leadership support for a busway along Tremont Av – Specific request for more bus priority in CB 5

tool_args.label: Community Board 6 (Bronx)
tool_args.raw_text: Community Board 6 Feedback: – Community members use all transportation modes – driving, transit, biking, walking – and value fast, reliable and safe mobility – Congestion and double-parking a big issue on Tremont Av – Public transit often not seen as a viable option due to crowded buses, unreliable service, and safety concerns – Concerns that bus priority could reduce parking availability and cause construction-related disruptions

payload.description: Bronx Community Board 6

evidence_refs.source_quote: Community Board 6 Feedback:
– Community members use all transportation modes

tool_args.label: Tremont Av Bus Priority Project
tool_args.raw_text: Tremont Av Bus Priority Project - Draft Proposal – Community Advisory Board - July 10, 2024

payload.description: Proposed bus priority project on Tremont Avenue from University Avenue to Bronx River Parkway, including a busway between Third Avenue and Southern Boulevard and curbside/offset bus lanes on additional segments.

Busway between Third Av and Southern Blvd in both directions
Considering bus lanes on several segments of Tremont Av

tool_args.label: Busway between Third Avenue and Southern Boulevard
tool_args.raw_text: Busway between Third Av and Southern Blvd in both directions

payload.locations: Tremont Avenue between Third Avenue and Southern Boulevard, Bronx
payload.location_text: Tremont Av between Third Av and Southern Blvd
payload.description: Busway in both directions on Tremont Avenue from Third Avenue to Southern Boulevard. Buses, trucks, and emergency vehicles can travel along the entire corridor. Local access allowed for other vehicles, including cars, taxis & for-hire vehicles - vehicles access from side streets, must leave at next required turn. Allows parking, loading, deliveries & customer access.

tool_args.label: Curbside Bus Lanes on Tremont Avenue
